sglang.title: feat: Add ModelScope support for multimodal_gen models
sglang.author: yrk111222
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR adds ModelScope support for diffusion models in SGLang, enabling users in regions with limited Hugging Face access to download and run diffusion models from ModelScope..

Add support for downloading diffusion models from ModelScope via the SGLANG_USE_MODELSCOPE=True

sglang.title: [diffusion] chore: fix unclean shutdown and resource leaks
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Resource leakage warnings (e.g., resource_tracker semaphore leaks, ProcessGroupNCCL warnings) during the shutdown of the local diffusion server exists.
Motivation
This PR ensures a clean, graceful, and faster exit process.

Modifications

fix process tracking
graceful shutdown protocol
resource clea

sglang.title: [Feature] Support bidirectional attention for Gemma-3
sglang.author: zzhbrr
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As discussed in Question about the multimodal attention mask in Gemma-3 · Issue #10309 · sgl-project/sglang, the Gemma-3 multimodal model uses bidirectional attention between image tokens during the prefill stage.
Now, SGLang only support causal attention for prefill stage.

sglang.title: feat(kv-events): Add medium field to KV event types for storage tier tracking
sglang.author: ishandhanani
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add medium field to BlockStored and BlockRemoved event classes in kv_events.py to indicate which storage tier the block resides in. This enables KV-aware routers to track SGLang KV blocks across all hi-cache storage tiers (L1/GPU, L2/Host, L3/Storage).
Changes

Add MEDIUM_GPU, MEDIUM_CPU_TIE
